name: replace
description: Find and replace text within a file. Replaces the first occurrence by default, or all occurrences with replace_all. The old_str must match exactly (including whitespace). Returns the number of replacements made.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to modify.

old_str.description: The exact string to find in the file. Must match the file content exactly, including whitespace and line endings.

new_str.description: The replacement string. Use an empty string to delete the matched text.

replace_all.description: Whether to replace all occurrences of old_str. Defaults to false (replaces first occurrence only).

session_id.description: Session ID for log_manager integration. Auto-injected by the engine.
